title: Use robust cipher algorithms
description: Checks for the use of weak cipher algorithms in cryptographic operations.
message: Use a more secure cipher algorithm

noncompliant.code:
import hashlib
hasher = hashlib.md5()
hasher.update(secret_data.encode())
password_hash = hasher.hexdigest()
noncompliant.description: Using MD5 for hashing sensitive data

compliant.code:
import hashlib
hasher = hashlib.sha256()
hasher.update(secret_data.encode())
password_hash = hasher.hexdigest()
compliant.description: Using SHA256 for hashing sensitive data

why_is_this_an_issue: Weak cipher algorithms can be easily broken, making sensitive data vulnerable to attacks.
how_to_fix: Replace weak ciphers with stronger and more secure alternatives.

checks.message: Avoid using weak cipher algorithms. Use robust algorithms like AES.
